_note: NON-COMPLIANT fixture: reproduces the order-dependent masking bypass. An Ineffective control (C-ORD-INEFF) is mapped after an Unsubstantiated control on a within-appetite risk, and remediation_required is left false with an empty remediation_plan. Every OTHER validate_output check passes, so before the fail-closed fix this validated (exit 0); after the fix it must be rejected (exit 1).
